arts.ttl: Tottenham could sign £13m forward compared to Jarrod Bowen if Mathys Tel move fails - Fabrizio Romano
Football transfer rumours: Tyler Dibling to reject Bayern Munich for Spurs?
arts.sum: Today’s tittle-tattle is 110% Faithful Breath is bated and hooks are tentered, the country as one and preparing for the biggest day of the year: Marcus Mumford’s birthday. But tomorrow is also another day closer to the transfer deadline, with Arsenal making yesterday’s biggest move, seeking attention by offering for Aston Villa’s Ollie Watkins. However, with Jhon Durán opting for a career break at Al-Nassr, the chances of such a deal happening seem slim – though which centre-forward wouldn’t be seduced by the prospect of the incomparable thrill of waiting ages and ages before taking a corner or free-kick? A second bid is said to be incoming. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa could ruin Tottenham’s signing attempts – Duran cash would help push Spurs aside
arts.sum: Aston Villa could be about to ruin Tottenham’s hopes of signing Mathy’s Tel as they are now interested in the Bayern Munich forward also. That’s according to journalist Fabrice Hawkins, who reports that John Durán’s move to Al-Nassr has pushed Aston Villa to be interested in Tel.
